extension.summary: Fetch TV show metadata from themoviedb.org
extension.description: TMDB TV show scraper with improved artwork handling.
extension.news: This experimental release is a ground up rewrite by MikeSiLVO Season-aware artwork selection Better artwork distribution across all art types Fix Fanart.tv URLs with special characters Fanart.tv source preference settings Fix Fanart.tv season art with no number getting assigned to all seasons instead of specials Artwork scoring: language + resolution Prioritize user-language clearart from Fanart.tv Punctuation agnostic title matching, year filter fallback
